description_long: This is a modern, multifunctional loft bed constructed primarily from wood with a light, natural finish. The bed features a raised sleeping platform with protective side panels and a visible mattress, accessible via a set of integrated stairs on one side. Each stair step appears to double as a storage drawer, maximizing utility in compact spaces. The front of the bed includes a large under-bed storage drawer, and the overall design is boxy and robust, with clean, straight lines. The headboard and footboard are both present, with the headboard being higher and more enclosed. The bed is designed for both sleeping and storage, making it ideal for urban apartments or small living spaces.
description: A modern loft bed with integrated stairs and multiple storage drawers, finished in light wood. The design is boxy, functional, and space-efficient.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall, flat wood panel and the angled stair rail with cut-out handles.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the mattress, high headboard, and the full set of stairs with storage drawers on the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the uninterrupted wood panel and the protective side rail.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the stair layout, mattress area, and the overall rectangular footprint.
